items.title: Formula One And Salesforce AI Tool Reshapes Fan Engagement And Monetisation Potential
items.description: Formula One Group (NasdaqGS:FWON.K) and Salesforce have launched an AI-powered fan companion agent ahead of the 2026 regulation changes. The new tool is built on Salesforce’s Agentforce 360 platform and is designed to provide personalized, real-time information on upcoming technical regulations. The AI companion is part of Formula One Group’s push to grow digital engagement and reach a younger, more tech-focused global audience. Formula One Group, which controls the commercial rights to...
